sections.title: If the player is wearing a Vyre noble disguise

lines.speaker: Trader Sven
lines.text: Oh... Sorry, we're not meant to talk to the nobles.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not too bad thanks, but I wanted to ask a question.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What have you got for sale?

lines.speaker: Trader Sven
lines.text: I'm a black-market trader. Fancy taking a look at my wares?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, I'll take a look at your wares.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What sort of stuff have you got?

lines.speaker: Trader Sven
lines.text: Well then, young [lad/lass], that is a good question. In fact, I specifically deal in vyrewatch uniforms. They might leave you alone a bit more if they think you're one of them!

lines.speaker: Trader Sven
lines.text: Makes it easier to move around the sectors without them demanding a blood tithe every time you dare breathe. So then, do you wanna have a look at my stuff?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, I'll take a look at your wares.

lines.speaker: Trader Sven
lines.text: You're in sector one of Meiyerditch. And don't forget, we're all here forever.
